title: BA12 7BZ, Amber Real Estate Investments Limited: environmental permit surrender issued - EPR/PP3232EF/S005
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the decision document for:   Operator name: Amber Real Estate Investments Limited Installation name: Sutton Veny Farm Poultry Unit Permit number: EPR/PP3232EF/S005  "
